name: @epicor-toolkit/kinetic-grid-fix-extension
description: Manifest V3 extension for Epicor Kinetic: fixes three main.js grid defects (group/ungroup virtualization-defeat memory leak via the binding-directive rebind layer, blank-viewport-after-bulk-load misalignment via a virtual-scroll alignment watchdog, and boolean checkbox-glyph presentation drift via a scoped style standardizer; and a grouping-draws-empty-grid fix via a length-aware groupBindingData source-chain rewrite, so drag-to-group renders group rows on DataView-bound and server-paged grids instead of "No records available."); adds an auto-size-columns injector (measures rendered cells — including each cell's real padding/border for native-parity sizing — and pins each column's <col> width to its content on every dataset load, with a Column-spacing density slider for maximum horizontal information density — ISOLATED world, live) and an opt-in bigger virtual scroll buffer (renders ~4x the grid's natural window via the rebind hook so fast scrolls stay populated — baked into the patched bundle, debugger-mode); plus live theming controls (disable-theming pins the stock palette; per-family custom colors) and per-component-family density/padding sliders, text-area auto-size, and full-width AppStudio/panel-card mode delivered by ISOLATED-world CSS injectors. Debugger rewrite and extra hosts are optional user grants. All features default OFF.

scripts.check: node --check src/background.js && node --check src/grid-revirtualize-fix.js && node --check src/grid-blank-fix.js && node --check src/grid-checkbox-style-fix.js && node --check src/grid-group-data-fix.js && node --check src/patch-transform.js && node --check src/inject-main-world.js && node --check src/theme-control.js && node --check src/padding-control.js && node --check src/grid-autofit.js && node --check src/grid-header-wrap.js && node --check src/column-personalizer.js && node --check src/grid-focus-scroll-fix.js
scripts.package: npm run check && npm test && npm run build
